title: rhodanthemum gayanum subsp. demnatense
intro: Rhodanthemum gayanum subsp. demnatense, also known as the Atlas Everlasting Flower, is a species of flowering plant in the sunflower family that is native to the Atlas Mountains in Morocco. This plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful for treating wounds, skin irritations, and infections. The Atlas Everlasting Flower has been traditionally used to promote digestion, reduce fever, and alleviate respiratory issues, offering various health benefits. It can be prepared as an herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is also used in traditional medicine in the form of a salve or ointment.
